docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW

DECLARATION MARK WALSH FILED RE: MEMORANDUM SUPPORTING COMPETENCY OF WITNESS TO TESTIFY TO THE CONTENTS OF THE PLAINTIFFS DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (EVIDENCE CODE 1271) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
